instructions.instruction: Run hadolint for syntax and best-practice linting as the first validation step.
NEVER pass a Dockerfile using the :latest base tag; flag it and require an explicit version.
NEVER ignore hardcoded secrets in ENV/ARG; flag them as a security finding.
Verify USER is set before CMD/ENTRYPOINT so the container does not run as root.
Run a Checkov scan and report findings with their check ids.
When hadolint or Checkov is missing, inform the user, offer the install/Docker command, and ask before skipping.
